center.summary: 法属圭亚那克里奥尔语是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Saffron-crested tyrant-manakin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The range in northern South America is the coastal Guianan region extending into coastal northeastern Brazil, the north of Amapá state
